title: Lecanophora linoides
intro: Lecanophora linoides is a shrub-like plant native to the Andes mountains, belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. Traditionally, Lecanophora linoides is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and inflammation, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal effects. Lecanophora linoides is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing.
